title.ko: 중량 측정
title.en: WEIGHING

definition.ko: 사용하는 수단에 특징이 있는 중량측정 장치 기계적 G01G1/00, G01G3/00 유체적 G01G5/00 전기적, 자기적 G01G7/00 기타 G01G9/00 특수한 성질을 가진 부하의 중량측정에 의해 특징지어지는 중량 측정장치, 또는 이에 적합한 중량측정장치 G01G11/00 ～ 19/00 세부 G01G21/00 보조장치 G01G23/00

title.en: Weighing apparatus involving the use of a counterweight or other counterbalancing mass
Pendulum-weight apparatus
the pendulum having a fixed pivot axis
with a plurality of pendulums
the pendulum having a moving pivot axis, e.g. a floating pendulum
with a plurality of pendulums
Constructional arrangements for obtaining equal indicative divisions
Temperature-compensating arrangements
Means for correcting for obliquity of mounting
Balances involving the use of a pivoted beam, i.e. beam balances
Beam balances having the pans carried below the beam, and for use with separate counterweights
for precision weighing
Platform-type scales, i.e. having the pans carried above the beam
with associated counterweight or set of counterweights
involving means for automatically lifting counterweights corresponding to the load
with electrical or electromechanical control means
wherein the counterweight is in the form of a chain
wherein the counterweights are in the form of rider-weights
involving a fixed counterweight, with poise-weights selectively added to the load side
wherein the counterweights are slidable along the beam, e.g. steelyards
with automatically-driven counterweight
specially adapted for weighing by substitution
Temperature-compensating arrangements

title.ko: 탄성변형부재를 사용함을 특징으로 하는 중량측정장치, 예. 용수철 저울
title.en: Weighing apparatus characterised by the use of elastically-deformable members, e.g. spring balances
wherein the weighing element is in the form of a helical spring
using a plurality of springs
wherein the weighing element is in the form of a spiral spring
wherein the weighing element is in the form of a leaf spring
wherein the torsional deformation of a weighing element is measured

title.ko: 중량 측정 동안에 압축 또는 인장을 받는 고체를 중량측정 요소로 하는 것
title.en: wherein the weighing element is in the form of a solid body stressed by pressure or tension during weighing
having piezoelectric or piezo-resistive properties

title.ko: 전기저항변화를 측정하는 것(G01G 3/13이 우선)
title.en: measuring variations of electrical resistance (G01G0003130000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 그것에 특히 적합한 회로
title.en: Circuits specially adapted therefor

title.ko: 참조치와 비교를 동반하는 것(G01G 3/147이 우선)
title.en: involving comparison with a reference value (G01G0003147000 takes precedence)
involving digital counting
measuring variations of magnetic properties
measuring variations of frequency of oscillations of the body
Temperature-compensating arrangements
Weighing apparatus wherein the balancing is effected by fluid action
with a float or other member variably immersed in liquid
with means for measuring the pressure imposed by the load on a liquid
using electrical indicating means

title.ko: 자기적, 전자기적 또는 정전적 작용 혹은 그룹 1/00에서 5/00에 분류되지 않는 수단에 의해 평형하는 중량측정장치
title.en: Weighing apparatus wherein the balancing is effected by magnetic, electromagnetic, or electrostatic action, or by means not provided for in groups G01G0001000000-G01G0005000000
by electromagnetic action
with means for regulating the current to solenoids
by electrostatic action

title.ko: 그룹 1/00 ～ 7/00에 분류되지 않는 중량결정의 장치 또는 방법
title.en: Methods of, or apparatus for, the determination of weight, not provided for in groups G01G0001000000-G01G0007000000
Apparatus for weighing a continuous stream of material during flow; Conveyor-belt weighers
having mechanical weight-sensitive devices
having electrical weight-sensitive devices
having fluid weight-sensitive devices
having means for controlling the rate of feed or discharge
by controlling the height of the material on the belt
by controlling the speed of the belt
using totalising or integrating devices
being electric or electronic devices
using digital counting
being mechanical devices

title.ko: 재료의 정량을 꺼내기 위해 자동적인 공급 또는 추출을 하는 중량측정장치(연속하는 흐름의 중량 측정용 G01G 11/00; 검량 G01G 15/00; 유체용 G01G 17/04; 혼합되는 재료를 중량에 의해 배분되는 것 G01G 19/22 결합된 중량측정 G01G 19/387)
title.en: Weighing apparatus with automatic feed or discharge for weighing-out batches of material (for weighing a continuous stream G01G0011000000;check-weighing G01G0015000000;for fluids G01G0017040000;apportioning by weight materials to be mixed G01G0019220000;combinatorial weighing G01G0019387000)
Means for automatically loading weigh-pans or other receptacles, e.g. disposable containers, under control of the weighing mechanism
involving dribble-feed means controlled by the weighing mechanism to top up the receptacle to the target weight
wherein the main feed is effected by gravity from a hopper or chute
wherein the main feed is effected by mechanical conveying means, e.g. by belt conveyors or by vibratory conveyors
wherein the main feed is effected by pneumatic conveying means, e.g. by fluidised feed of granular material
Arrangements for compensating for material suspended at cut-off, i.e. for material which is still falling from the feeder when the weigher stops the feeder
Arrangements for determination of, or compensation for, the tare weight of an unloaded container, e.g. of a disposable container
Means for automatically discharging weigh receptacles under control of the weighing mechanism
by valves or flaps in the container bottom
by screw conveyors in the weigh receptacle
by tilting or rotating the receptacle

title.ko: 자동공급 또는 배출장치를 제어하는 중량측정기구
title.en: Weighing mechanism control arrangements for automatic feed or discharge
involving fluid-pressure systems

title.ko: 용기의 적재 또는 배출을 제어하는 전기적 변화를 포함하는 것
title.en: involving variation of an electrical variable which is used to control loading or discharge of the receptacle

title.ko: 참조치와의 비교를 동반하는 것(G01G 13/29가 우선)
title.en: involving comparison with a reference value (G01G0013290000 takes precedence)
involving digital counting
for controlling automatic loading of the receptacle
involving limit switches or position-sensing switches
involving photoelectric devices
involving mechanical linkage motivated by the weighing mechanism

title.ko: 이동용기에 분배된 재료의 검량장치
title.en: Arrangements for check-weighing of materials dispensed into removable containers

title.ko: 요구되는 조립중량을 얻기 위해 재료의 필요량을 가감하는 수단을 가진 것(자동 배치(Batch) 계량기의 소량공급수단 G01G 13/04)
title.en: with provision for adding or removing a make-up quantity of material to obtain the desired net weight (dribble-feed means for automatic batch-weighers G01G0013040000)

title.ko: 요구되는 전체중량을 얻기 위해 재료의 필요량을 가감하는 수단을 가진 것(자동 배치(Batch) 계량기의 소량공급수단 G01G 13/04)
title.en: with provision for adding or removing a make-up quantity of material to obtain the desired gross weight (dribble-feed means for automatic batch-weighers G01G0013040000)

title.ko: 특수한 형상 또는 성질의 재료의 중량을 측정하는 장치 또는 방법(체적을 측정함으로써 중량을 결정하는 것 G01F)
title.en: Apparatus for, or methods of, weighing material of special form or property (determining weight by measuring volume G01F)
for weighing material of filamentary or sheet form
for weighing fluids, e.g. gases, pastes
having means for controlling the supply or discharge
for weighing livestock

title.ko: 그룹 11/00 ～ 17/00에 분류되지 않는 특수한 목적에 적용되는 중량측정장치 또는 방법
title.en: Weighing apparatus or methods adapted for special purposes not provided for in groups G01G0011000000-G01G0017000000

title.ko: 바퀴로 된 또는 구름체의 중량을 측정하는 것, 예. 차량(vehicles)
title.en: for weighing wheeled or rolling bodies, e.g. vehicles

title.ko: 이동중에 중량측정하기 위한 것(G01G 19/04, G01G 19/07이 우선)
title.en: for weighing during motion (G01G0019040000, G01G0019070000 take precedence)
for weighing railway vehicles
on overhead rails
for weighing aircraft
for incorporation in vehicles
having fluid weight-sensitive devices
having electrical weight-sensitive devices

title.ko: 현가부하의 중량을 측정하는 것(G01G 3/00이 우선)
title.en: for weighing suspended loads (G01G0003000000 takes precedence)
having fluid weight-sensitive devices
having electrical weight-sensitive devices
for weighing unbalanced loads
for apportioning materials by weighing prior to mixing them
using a single weighing apparatus
associated with two or more counterweighted beams
having fluid weight-sensitive devices
having electrical weight-sensitive devices
using two or more weighing apparatus
with electrical control means
with mechanical control means
program controlled, e.g. by perforated tape
for combinatorial weighing, i.e. selecting a combination of articles whose total weight or number is closest to a desired value
using two or more weighing units

title.ko: 중량에 관련하는 가격 또는 다른 양을 표시, 기록 또는 계산하기 위한 설비를 가진 것(중량측정장치용 표시수단 G01G 23/18; 중량측정장치용 기록수단 G01G 23/18)
title.en: with provisions for indicating, recording, or computing price or other quantities dependent on the weight (indicating means for weighing apparatus G01G0023180000;recording means for weighing apparatus G01G0023180000)
using mechanical computing means
using electromechanical or electronic computing means
using electronic computing means only
combined with recording means
with provision for checking computing part of balance

title.ko: 중량측정에 의해 계수하는 것(19/387이 우선)
title.en: for counting by weighing (G01G0019387000 takes precedence)
for weighing persons
Spring balances specially adapted for this purpose
Pendulum balances specially adapted for this purpose
having additional measuring devices, e.g. for height

title.ko: 다른 장치와 결합한 중량측정장치, 예. 가구와 결합(지팡이와 결합한 것 A45B 3/08)
title.en: Weighing apparatus combined with other objects, e.g. with furniture (with walking-sticks A45B0003080000)
combined with writing implements or paper-knives
combined with handles of tools or of household implements
combined with handles of suit-cases or trunks
combined with fishing equipment, e.g. with fishing rods
Over or under weighing apparatus
Percentage-indicating weighing apparatus, i.e. for expressing the weight as a percentage of a predetermined or initial weight

title.ko: 중량측정장치의 세부
title.en: Details of weighing apparatus
Arrangements of bearings
of knife-edge bearings
of ball or roller bearings
of flexure-plate bearings
Bearing mountings or adjusting means therefor
Floating suspensions; Arrangements of shock-absorbers
Devices for preventing derangement
Beams
of composite construction; Connections between different beams
Link connections between the beam and the weigh pan
for precision weighing apparatus
Weigh-pans or other weighing receptacles; Weighing platforms

title.ko: 저울대의 지지 또는 현가(G01G 21/24가 우선)
title.en: Support or suspension of weighing platforms (G01G0021240000 takes precedence)
Guides or linkages for ensuring parallel motion of the weigh-pans
Counterweights; Poise-weights; Sets of weights; Holders for the reception of weights
Frames; Housings
Means for preventing contamination by dust

title.ko: 중량측정장치의 부속장치
title.en: Auxiliary devices for weighing apparatus
Testing or calibrating of weighing apparatus
Relieving mechanisms; Arrestment mechanisms
for precision weighing apparatus
Means for damping oscillations, e.g. of weigh-beams
by fluid means
by electric or magnetic means
specially adapted for preventing oscillations due to movement of the load

title.ko: 용기중량을 결정하거나 또는 0으로 되돌림으로서 용기중량을 제거하기 위한 장치, 예. 기계적으로 작동되는 것(자동적재와 관련 G01G 13/14)
title.en: Devices for determining tare weight or for cancelling out the tare by zeroising, e.g. mechanically operated (in connection with automatic loading G01G0013140000)
electrically or magnetically operated

title.ko: 표시장치, 예. 원격표시기, 기록장치용; 눈금, 예. 분도된 것
title.en: Indicating devices, e.g. for remote indication; Recording devices; Scales, e.g. graduated
Indicating the weight by mechanical means
combined with price indicators
involving logarithmic scales
Drive for the indicating member, e.g. mechanical amplifiers
involving auxiliary or memory marks
with means for illuminating the scale
Indicating the weight by optical projection means
combined with price indicators
Indicating the weight by photographic recording

title.ko: 전기적수단에 의한 중량표시, 예. 광전셀을 사용하는 것
title.en: Indicating the weight by electrical means, e.g. using photoelectric cells

title.ko: 참조치와의 비교를 동반하는 것(G01G 23/37이 우선)
title.en: involving comparison with a reference value (G01G0023370000 takes precedence)
involving digital counting
during the movement of a coded element
Recording or coding devices specially adapted for weighing apparatus
mechanically operated
electrically operated
Coding devices therefor
Devices preventing recording until the weighing mechanism has come to rest

title.ko: 온도보상장치(G01G 1/14, G01G 1/42, G01G 3/18이 우선)
title.en: Temperature-compensating arrangements (G01G0001140000, G01G0001420000, G01G0003180000 take precedence)
